title: Xpressbees International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Xpressbees International Enterprises is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Xpressbees International Enterprises family as a E-commerce Executive in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Xpressbees International Enterprises:
Xpressbees International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees International Enterprises!
